name: East Tennessee Corvette Club Crossbody
description: Rev up your style with this one-of-a-kind handcrafted purse, made exclusively for East Tennessee Corvette Club fans. Lovingly stitched by hand right here in Tennessee, this statement bag proudly celebrates your passion for America's sports car and the club that shares it. Roomy enough for all your everyday essentials, it's the perfect companion for car shows, club meets, or any day you want to turn heads. A true conversation starter — and a piece no one else in the room will have. Upcycled jeans, 1 zipper compartment, 1 exterior and 1 interior pocket, fully lined with adjustable shoulder strap.

name: Jean Crossbody
description: Classic never goes out of style. This handcrafted denim purse has that perfectly worn-in, effortlessly cool look that pairs with absolutely everything in your closet. Made stitch by stitch with care and attention to detail, it's the kind of bag that gets better with every wear. Spacious, sturdy, and undeniably charming — toss it over your shoulder and let the compliments roll in. Upcycled jeans, 3 zipper compartments, separate phone pocket, exterior pocket, built in wallet, fully lined with adjustable shoulder strap.

name: Red Corvette PurseCrossbody
description: For the woman who loves fast cars and fierce style. This bold, handcrafted purse puts the legendary Corvette front and center in vivid red — the color of speed, passion, and turning heads at 60 mph. Each one is made by hand, so no two are exactly alike. Whether you're headed to a car show or just running errands in style, this bag makes a statement before you even say a word. Upcycled jeans, Embroidered Corvette logo, 4 zipper compartments, fully lined, adjustable shoulder strap

name: Small Corvette Cross Body
description: Big personality, compact size. This cute handcrafted Corvette purse is the perfect go-anywhere bag for the Corvette lover who likes to travel light without sacrificing style. Small enough to keep close, roomy enough for your must-haves — phone, keys, cards, and a little lipstick for good measure. Handmade with love and built to be admired. Upcycled jeans, embroidered Corvette logo,4 zipper compartments, fully lined with adjustable shoulder strap.

name: Beige Corvette Show Tote Bag
description: Carry the car show spirit everywhere you go. This handcrafted beige tote is a nod to the Corvette shows that bring enthusiasts together — warm, classic, and always in good taste. The neutral tone goes with everything, making it just as at home on a Saturday morning farmers market run as it is at the show field. Roomy, sturdy, and made by hand with the kind of care that only a fellow Corvette lover would understand. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.

name: Black Corvette Tote Bag
description: Sleek, bold, and built for the Corvette faithful. This striking black handcrafted tote lets your love of America's sports car do the talking — no subtlety required. The deep black background makes every detail pop, and the spacious interior means you never have to choose between style and practicality. Handmade one at a time, because great things never come off an assembly line. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.

name: Corvette General Motors Division Tote Bag
description: Upcycled jeans, 1 zipper compartment, 1 exterior and 1 interior pocket, fully lined with adjustable shoulder strap. A salute to automotive legend. This handcrafted tote celebrates the iconic Corvette — General Motors Division — in all its heritage glory. For the enthusiast who knows the history, appreciates the craftsmanship, and isn't afraid to wear their passion proudly. Generously sized for everything you need to haul, and handmade with the same pride that goes into every 'Vette that rolls off the line.

name: Corvette Racing Tote Bag
description: Feel the rush every time you reach for your bag. This handcrafted Corvette Racing tote channels the thrill of the track with bold, eye-catching design made for fans who live for speed. Tough enough for everyday use, exciting enough for race day — take it to the show, the paddock, or the grocery store and watch heads turn. Made by hand, one stitch at a time, for the fan who never slows down. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.

Lovingly handmade with rich Corvette-inspired detail, it's a keepsake and a workhorse all in one. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, fully lined. Made for the show season and beyond.

name: Corvette Tote Bag
description: The classic Corvette tote — timeless, handcrafted, and made for anyone who believes a bag should be as exciting as the car in the driveway. This versatile everyday tote pairs Corvette pride with genuine handmade quality, giving you a bag that's both a conversation piece and a reliable daily carry. name: Made in America Tote Bag
description: Wear your American pride on your arm. This handcrafted tote celebrates the spirit of American-made craftsmanship — bold, dependable, and built to last. From the hands that stitched it to the legendary cars that inspired it, everything about this bag says made right here, made with heart. Roomy, durable, and unapologetically American. name: Vette Fest Roaring 20s Speakeasy Tote Bag
description:
**Vintage-Inspired “Vette Fest” Canvas Tote Bag – 42nd Annual Roaring 20’s Speakeasy Edition**
Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined. Make a bold statement with this eye-catching commemorative tote bag from the 42nd Annual Vette Fest. Designed with a vibrant, vintage-inspired “Roaring 20’s Speakeasy” theme, this bag blends retro automotive culture with playful illustrated storytelling for a truly standout accessory.

Crafted in durable canvas with sturdy navy shoulder straps, this oversized tote features a striking dual-sided design: a clean, solid blue upper panel paired with a detailed, high-impact graphic print celebrating the East Tennessee Corvette Club event in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee (2021). The interior is lined with a coordinating patterned fabric and includes a secure zippered pocket for small essentials. Perfect for car enthusiasts, collectors, or anyone who loves unique event memorabilia, this tote is both functional and highly collectible.

**Features:**

* Durable canvas construction for everyday use
* Spacious interior with patterned lining
* Interior zippered pocket for secure storage
* Comfortable reinforced shoulder straps
* Limited-edition 42nd Annual Vette Fest commemorative design
* Bold, detailed automotive-themed artwork

**Ideal for:**
Car shows, weekend trips, shopping, beach days, or as a display piece for collectors of automotive memorabilia.

name: Vette Fest Sliding Into More Fun Tote Bag
description: Sliding into fun, one stitch at a time. This playful Vette Fest tote captures the joy, the energy, and the pure good times of one of the most beloved Corvette festivals around. Handcrafted with a sense of humor and a whole lot of heart, it's the bag that keeps the Vette Fest spirit alive long after the show's over. A one-of-a-kind memento you'll actually use. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.

name: Vette Fest Tote Bag

Lovingly handcrafted and designed to be carried proudly, it's the kind of keepsake that gets passed around the show field and talked about for years. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.

name: Vette Fest Year of the Cowboy Tote Bag
description: Saddle up, Corvette style. The Vette Fest Year of the Cowboy tote is a spirited, handcrafted celebration of two American icons — the Corvette and the cowboy spirit. Bold, festive, and completely one of a kind, this bag brings the energy of a great show year to life in every stitch. A limited-edition keepsake that any Vette Fest fan will treasure. Upcycled TShirt, 2 large interior zipper pockets, 2 exterior pockets large enough to hold water bottles, fully lined.
